description_long: This hamburger features a rounded, lightly textured sesame seed bun with several white sesame seeds scattered on top. Beneath the bun, a layer of bright red tomato slices sits above a slice of yellow cheese, which in turn covers a thick brown patty. At the base, a vibrant green layer of lettuce peeks out, adding a crisp visual contrast. The layers are neatly stacked, with each ingredient clearly defined and slightly protruding from the sides, giving the burger a full and appetizing appearance. The surface of the bun appears soft and matte, while the cheese and tomato have a slightly smoother finish. No packaging or additional garnishes are visible.
description: A classic hamburger with a sesame seed bun, visible tomato, cheese, patty, and lettuce layers, all neatly stacked and vibrant in color.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sesame seed bun, tomato, cheese, patty, and lettuce layers, with the tomato and cheese most prominent.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, this view reveals more of the tomato layer on the left and a fuller view of the lettuce at the base.
description_view_2: Direct rear view, with the bun, cheese, patty, and lettuce clearly visible, and the tomato layer less pronounced.
description_view_3: Rotated to the right, this view highlights the tomato and lettuce layers on the right side, with the bun's texture and seeds visible.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce forms the base layer, followed by a thick patty, a slice of yellow cheese, and tomato slices just beneath the top bun. The toppings are evenly distributed and slightly protrude from the sides.
